query:
ALTER TABLE creditPurchases 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS creditPackId INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripeSessionId VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS bonusCredits INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS totalCredits INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL;
